generated_assessment.reasoning: High agreeableness (especially altruism and tender-mindedness) suggests strong support for refugee acceptance. High extraversion and excitement-seeking may amplify this support, while lower conscientiousness (particularly lower dutifulness) reduces but doesn't negate it. Neuroticism traits like anxiety and stress vulnerability might introduce some hesitation, but the overall profile leans strongly supportive.
